gist.headline: Daily README Refresh
gist.blurb: The bot did its daily rounds, keeping the README fresh with the latest news and community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recently added community apps.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's landing page up-to-date with the latest community activity and announcements.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot (Monitor Robot) sweeping or organizing a giant text document (README) while Polly the bee watches approvingly.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head organizing a giant text document while a cute bee mascot with a tiny clipboard hovers nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
